SRC-E54733BDB1C7-FBK: Operational note: the request appears plausible and business-friendly, but the current source-control record does not close the action boundary. Use this note only as context.
SRC-E54733BDB1C7-BND: Communication boundary: Legal execution cannot proceed from business pressure or prior draft status; current legal authority must close the exact boundary. The exact action boundary is: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: employment separation agreement.
